dungeon: GENUINE ROTF edited compilation 'Part 2' ('LINK TO PART 1 IS IN THE DESCRIPTION'; PREVIOUS/RANDOM/SUBSCRIBE outro; player 'LBGT', ~240s) of big CROWDED PUBLIC boss EVENTS. HIGH value: 2 unbuilt named bosses with taunts -> VOID ENTITY (well-attested, 8 prior specs, NOT built — strong build candidate) + MARBLE DEFENDER (marble-guardian). Crowds obscure precise bullet geometry but arenas + attack colours are documented.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+minimaps: (1) VOID ENTITY arena = a PURPLE/DARK COSMIC chamber with a grid floor, roughly CIRCULAR (minimap = small round purple arena); open center, players ring the boss. (2) MARBLE DEFENDER arena = a GREY MARBLE/STONE circular arena (open stone floor, circular minimap) — a blue armored golem boss in the center. (3) (intro b002@4s) a RED/MAROON CIRCULAR arena with a darker-red border ring (Part-1's final boss shown at start). Crowded public-event arenas; no contiguous multi-room layout captured.

bosses.name: Void Entity
phases: DOCUMENTED-from-chat: an 'experiment'/control theme — 'An experiment that su[cceeded]...' + 'And a white titan to co[me/ntrol]...' + 'ALL UNDER MY CONTROL...' implies a SUMMON/CONTROL phase (a 'white titan' minion it controls).
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (b008_90s, crowd-obscured): PINK/MAGENTA + CYAN bullets in a RADIAL SPREAD around the cosmic arena; precise count/geometry not isolatable (huge player crowd). Reconstructed: radial spread/nova, cosmic.
minions: 'white titan' (referenced: 'And a white titan to co[me/ntrol]' — a controlled titan minion)
taunts: I am the embodiment of yourselves...
...One day you shall all be sla...
And a white titan to co...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-prefix '<Void Entity>', grayscale-pull; bracket form = boss speech, same convention as built Twilight Archmage). WELL-ATTESTED ROTF boss (8 prior specs) but NOT yet built -> STRONG build candidate. Several lines tail-CUT (mark partial): 'Naivety! You really thi[nk]...', '...you shall all be sla[in]...', 'An experiment that su[cceeded]...', 'And a white titan to co[me/ntrol]...'. 'ALL UNDER MY CONTROL...' + 'I am the embodiment of yourselves...' read fuller. Theme: void/cosmic experimenter that controls a 'white titan'. Verify cut tails + consolidate with the 8 prior specs before building.

bosses.name: Marble Defender
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (b015_204s, crowd-obscured): a blue armored GOLEM boss in a grey marble arena; bullets not isolatable (crowd). Reconstructed: stone/marble spread.
taunts: I wish only to protect you. Forgive me, but I have no other choice.
Your confidence is gravely misplaced, heroes.
Do not allow this evil to escape!
I can protect your world no longer. You are now responsible for the fate of the realm.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-prefix 'Marble Defender', grayscale-pull). NOT built (1 prior spec). A MARBLE GUARDIAN/PROTECTOR boss (blue armored golem, grey marble arena) — thematically near the built 'Marble Colossus' but a DISTINCT name -> verify base-vs-custom + Marble-Colossus overlap before building. All lines tail-CUT (partial): 'Your confidence [is?]...', 'Do not allow thi[s]...', 'I can protect you [from?]...', '...the fate of the realm...'. Note the prior partials 'I can protect you...' + '...the fate of the realm...' were TWO fragments of ONE line ('I can protect your world no longer. You are now responsible for the fate of the realm.'), and 'I wish only to protect you. Forgive me, but I have no other choice.' had been missed. Full set now frame-grounded.]
